incident_details.description: High risk alerts from NetWitness Endpoint on host KELLYWANG (IP 192.168.10.204) with traffic to 192.168.10.202 suggest possible lateral movement or data exfiltration. Unknown processes and odd device behavior indicate potential compromise.

risk_rating.rationale: High risk score (70) and internal IP traffic suggest adversary is highly likely to initiate, occurrence is medium due to low alert count, and adverse impact is high due to potential lateral movement or data exfiltration.

triage.ioc_summary:
[CONFIDENTIALITY] Changes in network traffic telemetry (known bad IPs/domains), Unknown traffic originating from/terminating on the device — Traffic between internal IPs 192.168.10.204 and 192.168.10.202 may indicate lateral movement or data exfiltration; unknown traffic from endpoint alerts.
[INTEGRITY] Odd device/platform behaviour, Unknown process running — High risk alerts from NetWitness Endpoint suggest odd device behavior and unknown processes running.

source_incident.title: High Risk Alerts: NetWitness Endpoint for KELLYWANG
